productDisplayName: Peter England Men Grey Formal Trousers
description: Style Note Crafted from a soft fabric, these trousers from peter england is a perfect garment for you to step into style in ease. With smart cuts that offer a flattering Fit, these trousers makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp formals, classy accessories and leather shoes. Product Details Grey striped trouser has flat front, pockets on the sides, two pockets at the back with button closures, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the front Material and Care Terylene Rayon Machine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergent Use only non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Warm iron Size and Fit Smart Fit The model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size 34
